name: Wurm Tackle
outcome: With sudden blinding speed, [AttackerName] rushes forwards and knocks [TargetName] to the ground!|n|As [TargetHeOrShe] recollects [TargetHimOrHer]self [AttackerName] grabs a hold of [TargetName] with a malicious grin, and plunges the tapered end of [AttackerHisOrHer] tail into [TargetName]'s vulnerable rear!|n|[TargetName] can't help but yelp in a mixture of pain and pleasure from the sudden intrusion!
miss: With sudden blinding speed, [AttackerName] rushes forwards and tries to knock [TargetName] to the ground, but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to avoid [AttackerName] as [AttackerHeOrShe] barrels towards them!
